passage.title: Reading Basket Board
passage.text: Our group keeps a center choice board by the whiteboard. During center time, Sora checks it before cleanup time. The center choice board has basket cards for picture books and easy readers for the day's job. The room helper asks us to find our classroom job. Sometimes we compare today's basket card with yesterday's basket card and notice one small change. We like the center choice board because it helps us move around the room smoothly.

questions.prompt: What is this passage mostly about?
questions.rationale: The whole passage explains how the center choice board is used.

questions.prompt: Where is the center choice board?
questions.rationale: The first sentence says the center choice board is by the whiteboard.

questions.prompt: When does Sora use the center choice board?
questions.rationale: The second sentence says Sora uses it during center time.

questions.prompt: What does the center choice board have?
questions.rationale: The third sentence says the center choice board has basket cards.

questions.prompt: What does compare mean in the fifth sentence?
questions.rationale: Compare means to look at two things and think about them together.

questions.prompt: What does notice mean in the fifth sentence?
questions.rationale: Notice means to see and pay attention to something.
